steps.name: plan
steps.input_summary: User asks how to reset MFA on their corporate account after phone replacement
steps.output_summary: Plan: look up MFA reset documentation, draft a clear reply with reset steps

steps.name: search_docs
steps.input_summary: Query: corporate MFA reset phone lost
steps.output_summary: Found doc: KB-2041 MFA Reset Guide. Includes admin-initiated and self-service flows.

steps.name: reason
steps.input_summary: Compose response from KB-2041 content addressing device replacement scenario
steps.output_summary: Drafted reply: go to account security, click reset MFA, confirm via backup email, set up new device with authenticator app

steps.name: verify
steps.input_summary: Validate agent response against KB-2041 and original question
steps.output_summary: Response matches ground truth. Minor phrasing differences but all key steps present.

result.label: pass
result.summary: Accurate MFA reset instructions produced; minor phrasing variation from reference
